positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a vibrant sunset over a calm, stylized ocean. The scene features silhouetted palm trees in the foreground, contrasting sharply against a gradient sky painted with deep oranges, magentas, and electric blues. The central composition should be symmetrical, emphasizing the arc of the setting sun. Use a graphic, pop-art aesthetic with thick, clean linework and flat color blocks, perfect for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, ultra-detailed print artwork, vector graphic style.
negative: blur, grainy, text, logo, trademark, watermark, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, abstract, realistic photography, complex shadows
